title: Sergio Meza | Chief Marketing Officer | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Chief Marketing Officer
Request A Consultation
Dr. Sergio Meza, Ph.D., is the Chief Marketing Officer at Colombo & Hurd.
Dr. Meza is a marketing executive with over 20 years of experience driving revenue growth through innovative strategies in technology, media, and education. At Colombo & Hurd, he leverages his expertise in digital marketing, data analytics, and education to propel business success.
Holding an MA and Ph.D. in Marketing from New York University (NYU), as well as an MBA from Instituto de Estudios Superiores de Administración (IESA), Dr. Meza possesses a deep understanding of marketing principles and practices. His extensive experience managing multiple websites, paid advertising, SEM, SEO, social media, and email marketing has equipped him with the skills to develop and execute effective marketing campaigns.
As an expert in advanced data analytics, Dr. Meza has a strong foundation in statistics, econometrics, and predictive modeling. His research has been published in top journals in economics and marketing, and he has taught advanced marketing topics at several universities in Canada and the US.
Outside of his professional pursuits, Dr. Meza enjoys spending time with his wife and three children, exploring art, outdoor activities, ballet, and technology. An avid runner, he prefers the 5K distance to stay fit.
